I agree with the conclusion drawn earlier. However, adding another point might help solidify our rationale further. Specifically, bullous pemphigoid involves autoantibodies targeted towards desmoglein 3 and other basement membrane antigens, which leads to significant damage and separation occurring precisely under the basement membrane layer. This unique mechanism distinguishes BP from others like PV and IgA pemphigus, reinforcing its classification as involving the deepest level of skin integrity compromise.
